findings.message: State "promo" is unreachable from entry "cart". It was designed but no user can ever arrive there.
findings.fix: Add a transition leading to "promo" or remove it.

findings.message: Screen "CartScreen" requires state "empty" but it has not been designed.
findings.fix: Design the "empty" state of "CartScreen" (or remove it from requiredStates if truly not needed).

findings.message: Screen "CartScreen" requires state "loading" but it has not been designed.
findings.fix: Design the "loading" state of "CartScreen" (or remove it from requiredStates if truly not needed).

findings.message: Screen "CartScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: error.*.
findings.fix: Add error.* to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: Screen "AddressScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: loading, empty, error.*.
findings.fix: Add loading, empty, error.* to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: Screen "PaymentScreen" requires state "loading" but it has not been designed.
findings.fix: Design the "loading" state of "PaymentScreen" (or remove it from requiredStates if truly not needed).

findings.message: Screen "PaymentScreen" requires state "error.declined" but it has not been designed.
findings.fix: Design the "error.declined" state of "PaymentScreen" (or remove it from requiredStates if truly not needed).

findings.message: Screen "PaymentScreen" requires state "error.network" but it has not been designed.
findings.fix: Design the "error.network" state of "PaymentScreen" (or remove it from requiredStates if truly not needed).

findings.message: Screen "PaymentScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: empty.
findings.fix: Add empty to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: Screen "ConfirmScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: loading, empty, error.*.
findings.fix: Add loading, empty, error.* to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: Screen "PromoScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: loading, empty, error.*.
findings.fix: Add loading, empty, error.* to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: "Button.Primary" on screen "CartScreen" has contrast 2.95:1 (#8A8F98 on #F4F4F4) — below WCAG AA 4.5:1 for normal text.
findings.fix: Darken/lighten one side until the ratio reaches 4.5:1.

findings.message: "Button.Primary" on "CartScreen" has a 40px target — below the mweb minimum (44px recommended for touch web).
findings.fix: Increase the target (including padding/hit-slop) to at least 44px on mweb.

findings.message: "Button.Primary" on "CartScreen" has a 40px target — below the android minimum (Material 48dp).
findings.fix: Increase the target (including padding/hit-slop) to at least 48px on android.

findings.message: Label "Proceed to secure checkout" (cart.checkout) is 26 chars; at ×1.4 localization expansion it projects to 37, over the layout budget of 24. German will break this.
findings.fix: Shorten the English source, or widen the layout budget to ≥ 37 chars.
